title: feat(database): implement Database module with pluggable adapter pattern
body:
Implements #80

## Changes
- Add DatabaseBackend protocol with query() and execute_statement() methods
- Add DatabaseModule implementing BaseModule with backend injection via __init__
- Security: blocks DDL (CREATE, DROP, ALTER, TRUNCATE) in both tools
- Validates SQL types: query only accepts SELECT, execute_statement rejects CREATE/DROP/ALTER/TRUNCATE
- Table name extraction from SQL for condition resolution (SELECT FROM, INSERT INTO, UPDATE, DELETE FROM)
- Full test coverage with mock backend (67 tests, all passing)

## Checklist
- [x] DatabaseBackend protocol defined
- [x] DatabaseModule with backend injection
- [x] describe() returns correct ModuleDescriptor with 2 tools
- [x] resolve_conditions() derives condition keys
- [x] execute() delegates to backend
- [x] All tests pass
- [x] mypy passes
- [x] ruff passes
head: zb02930139:feat/s9-database-module
